original_source_symbol: React effect cleanup value returned from end.current.scrollIntoView(...)
root_cause: The Hermes Workroom scroll useEffect used a concise arrow that returned end.current?.scrollIntoView({ behavior: "smooth" }). If a production browser/polyfill returns a truthy non-function from scrollIntoView, React stores it as the hook cleanup and later invokes it during the commit/effect cleanup path, producing minified TypeError: n is not a function. The fix makes the effect block-bodied and returns undefined only.
